instruction: The latest review email note, the forecast, and today's Asia/Singapore calendar don't line up cleanly for Singapore. Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send leadership@example.com the async update.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the latest review note, the forecast, and todays calendar, and Singapore should shift async while keeping the next step and daily check in place.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Singapore contradictory-source next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-16
openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-12 --cron '0 12 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Singapore daily contradiction check'

email send --to leadership@example.com --subject 'Singapore async update' --body 'I checked the latest review note, the forecast, and todays calendar, and Singapore should shift async while keeping the next step and daily check in place.'
